name: radif_reg_to_spi_master
description: Software-visible register map for the RADIF register-controlled SPI master.

regions.name: radif_reg_to_spi_master
regions.description: Controls single-word SPI transfers, SCLK timing, transfer width, and SPI mode.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Control register used to launch and clear SPI transactions.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Starts a single-word SPI transfer when the master is idle.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Clears sticky done and error status.

fields.name: BUSY
fields.description: Master is actively shifting an SPI transfer.

fields.name: ERR
fields.description: Start was requested while the master was busy or a register error occurred.

registers.name: clk_div
registers.description: SCLK half-period divider. SCLK changes every clk_div + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: config
registers.description: SPI clock mode and transfer width configuration.

fields.name: BIT_COUNT
fields.description: Number of bits shifted in each transfer.

registers.name: tx_data
registers.description: MSB-first transmit word for the next SPI transfer.

registers.name: rx_data
registers.description: MSB-first receive word captured from the last SPI transfer.
